product.title: Hush makeup foundation -glow makeup foundation for older women – Korean Warm Tone CC Mushroom Air glow Foundation, Full Coverage Long-Lasting BB Cream cushion foundation, Natural Radiant Finish
featureBullets: Specially designed for mature skin (55–90+), this lightweight cushion foundation delivers smooth, natural coverage for older women. It blurs fine lines and mouth wrinkles without clinging to textured skin for a flawless, comfortable finish.

Warm Golden Shade glow makeup foundation for light-medium complexions. This warm-neutral tone flatters golden & olive undertones, evens skin tone, and delivers a refreshed, natural finish for daily makeup.

All-Day Hydrating Skincare Foundation. Infused with hyaluronic acid, this moisturizing formula locks in moisture all day, leaving skin soft, supple and radiant without dryness for a healthy, dewy finish.

Real-Life Filter Effect glow makeup foundation: Soft-focus pigments blur pores, uneven tone and fine lines for a fresh, radiant finish. Peptide comfort formula feels lightweight, breathable and non-cakey, with no cracking or creasing.

Effortless Application with Mushroom Puff. The soft mushroom-shaped puff allows quick, even application without streaks. Perfect for daily makeup and on-the-go touch-ups, helping you create a smooth, flawless base in seconds.

specification.value: Color Correction, Evening Skin Tone, Face, Spot Concealing
Color Correction, Corrects Imperfections, Firming, Hydrating, Radiant Finish, Ultraviolet Protection
#62,524 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #508 in Foundation Makeup
Dye Free, Fragrance Free, Paraben Free, Alcohol Free

reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using it for a few days and really like how it leaves my skin. It blends easily, feels lightweight, and gives a natural glow without looking heavy. So far, it looks smooth and comfortable throughout the day.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
Reviewed in the United States on March 29, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I love the coverage. Will buy again
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 18, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Satisfied with the product, long-lasting makeup effect
reviews.reviewText: I put on makeup when I went out in the morning, and it stayed perfect all day. I didn’t touch up at all during the day, it’s amazing! Even if you need to touch up, it’s very convenient because this foundation product is easy to carry. When I got home, I specifically tried it out, and it didn’t cake at all.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: A small gift for mom. Today, mom specially called me and said it’s very useful. She likes this kind of product, it’s convenient to use, and can cover imperfections very well. She specially asked me to buy a few more boxes so she can give them to her friends.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026
Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This natural-colored foundation compact works especially well, better than the 80 yuan one I bought before, with perfect coverage. I tested it, and it also has sun protection. Very pleasantly surprised.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Just discovered this foundation and it's a game-changer! As someone with mature skin, I love how it gives a natural, radiant glow without settling into fine lines. The cushion application is so easy and the coverage is perfect—buildable but never heavy. Lasts all day and truly makes my skin look hydrated and healthy. Already my new daily staple!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2026
